goal: Passer sous la barre symbolique des 70 kg dans une competition de fruits anthropomorphes
visual_style_prompt: Original high-quality 3D animated family movie style, anthropomorphic fruit-headed contestants with expressive fruit faces, no human faces, colorful reality TV villa, cinematic lighting, soft rounded shapes, glossy render, vertical TikTok composition, comedy reality show energy, no copyrighted characters, no existing studio style.
safety_rules: No insults aimed at real human weight or body type.
Characters are anthropomorphic fruits, not human targets.
Humor targets fruit personalities, situations, temptation, rules, production drama and excuses.
No medical advice or guaranteed weight-loss claims.
